Headline: #30 South Chicago Temporary Reroute near 91st/Burley
ShortDescription: 30 South Chicago buses temp. rerouted due to, street blockage near 91st/Burley.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#30 South Chicago buses temp. rerouted due to, street blockage near 91st/Burley.

Northbound buses will operate via 91st, Buffalo, and 92nd including the normal route streets.

Southbound buses will operate via 92nd, Buffalo, and 91st.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #62 Archer Temporary Reroute at Pulaski Orange Line.
ShortDescription: 62 Archer buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Pulaski Orange Line.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#62 Archer buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Archer, Pulaski, 51st - outside of the terminal, Karlov, Archer and over regular route, due to street blockage near Pulaski Orange Line.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Green Line Delays
ShortDescription: Green Line trains are running w/residual delays following an unauthorized person on the tracks at Ridgeland. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Green Line trains are running w/residual delays following an unauthorized person on the tracks at Ridgeland. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #22 Clark and #152 Addison Temporary Reroute near Clark/Addison
ShortDescription: #22 Clark and #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Clark/Addison.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#22 Clark and #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Clark/Addison.

#22 Clark buses will operate via Clark, Racine, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Clark.

#152 Addison buses will operate via Addison, Racine, Belmont, Halsted, then resume their normal route on Addison.

Allow extra travel time.
